mapper.sql: id, name, name_en, business_objects, value_logics, is_active, data_type, status, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM auth_rule_param
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nameEn}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
SELECT FROM auth_rule_param WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY name
mapper.update:
UPDATE auth_rule_param SET status = #{status}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id IN
#{id}
